# Key examples

Usa keys cortas, estables y orientadas a busqueda. Evita claves genericas.

## Convencion sugerida

- `routing.<topic>.<fact>`
- `qa.setup.<topic>`
- `qa.exec.<topic>`
- `qa.analysis.<topic>`
- `qa.exploration.<topic>`
- `logs.<topic>`
- `promptfoo.<topic>`
- `tilt.<topic>`
- `security.<topic>`
- `performance.<topic>`

## Ejemplos reales por dominio

- `routing.entrypoint.qa`
- `routing.playwright.worker-boundary`
- `qa.setup.api-project-base`
- `qa.setup.ui-mcp-required`
- `qa.exec.login-selector-fallback`
- `qa.exec.api-auth-precondition`
- `qa.analysis.orders-contract-baseline`
- `qa.analysis.ignore-ephemeral-fields`
- `qa.exploration.checkout-risk-invariant`
- `qa.exploration.auth-ambiguity-session-timeout`
- `logs.root-cause.db-connection-pool`
- `logs.runbook.kafka-rebalance-delay`
- `promptfoo.provider.default-regression`
- `promptfoo.baseline.cost-threshold-basic`
- `tilt.resource.api-port`
- `tilt.runbook.pending-resource-upstream-block`
- `security.constraint.non-destructive-sqli`
- `security.baseline.authz-rbac-check`
- `performance.baseline.api-p95-staging`
- `performance.constraint.max-safe-load-staging`
